title: Add integration test suite for launcher → launch flow
description: No end-to-end tests for the launcher selecting a profile and spawning the CLI. Add integration tests.

context.text: 66 integration tests: entry building, auth resolution, render output, keyboard state, launch command construction. 665 total tests.

acceptanceCriteria: Test keyboard navigation selects correct profile
Test launch command is correct with yolo/resume flags
Test sort modes produce correct order
